title: HR admin
description:
Immediate hire 
3 months contract
Location in North 

about the company
A leading global manufacturer within the high-tech industrial sector, known for driving innovation and supporting technical operations. The organization offers a stable and professional environment for individuals looking to contribute to a market-leading workforce.

about the job
This is a 3 months contract role focused on providing critical recruitment operations and onboarding support to ensure a seamless hiring experience.

  • Manage high-volume interview scheduling and serve as the primary point of contact for technical hires.

  • Facilitate the post-offer process by collecting and verifying all necessary candidate documentation.

  • Coordinate the end-to-end work pass application process in collaboration with the internal global services team.

  • Oversee pre-employment requirements, including medical check-up arrangements and mandatory training sessions.

  • Administer work pass issuance and cancellation procedures upon the commencement of new hires.

skills and experience required.

  • Proven 2-3 experience in recruitment coordination, HR administration, or onboarding operations.

  • Familiarity with Singapore work pass regulations and application processes.

  • Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple administrative tasks under tight timelines.

  • Effective communication skills to liaise with internal stakeholders and external candidates.

  • Proficiency in utilizing enterprise-level HRIS or ERP systems for data management and reporting.

For more information, please connect with Wai Ling Tai. (EA: 94C3609 / R1110392)

postedCompany.description:
Randstad is a global talent leader with the vision to be the world’s most equitable and specialised talent company. As a partner for talent and through our four specialisations - Operational, Professional, Digital and Enterprise - we provide clients with the high-quality, diverse and agile workforces that they need to succeed in a talent scarce world. We help people secure meaningful roles, develop relevant skills and find purpose and belonging in their workplace. Through the value we create, we are committed to a better and more sustainable future for all.

In Singapore, we provide specialised professional recruitment and employer branding consultation services to companies in these industries and functions:

Accounting & Finance
Banking & Financial Services
Construction & Property
Corporate & Secretarial Support
Engineering
Human Resources
Information Technology
Legal
Life Science
Sales, Marketing and Communications
Supply Chain & Procurement

For more information, please visit www.randstad.com.sg.
postedCompany.name: RANDSTAD PTE. LIMITED

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
